objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 2 semantic vector consistency with delete-before-upsert, project-scoped LanceDB filtering, generation metadata, and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving semantic delete-before-upsert, deleted-vector suppression, project isolation, missing LanceDB fallback behavior, and production build all pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 2 semantic vector consistency: LanceSemanticStore rows now include symbolName and generation, search fails closed without resolved scope, upsertChunks deletes old vectors by projectId+filePath before add, deleteFile supports incremental vector deletion, HybridRetriever and RepoIndexer degrade when semantic storage is unavailable so graph/keyword retrieval still works. Regression tests cover delete-before-upsert, deleted-vector suppression, project isolation, and missing semantic store fallback. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
